html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

Icker Jar is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is not craftable and can only be obtained by collecting globs of Icker with an Empty Bottle.

The Icker Jar can be used to create an Icker Preserve. It can also be thrown out, leaving a glob on the ground for 1 day. Doing so will also break the Bottle. The glob can be collected by another Empty Bottle before it is gone.

Usage

×3

×5

return Empty Bottles

×10

return Empty Bottles

Gallery

  • Wilson with Icker Jar equipped and a glob on the ground.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable ItemsResources

“I tend to keep things bottled up.”
–Wilson
“I won't mistake that for jam.”
–Willow
“This not edible.”
–Wolfgang
“I have an urge to toss it.”
–Wendy
“THROW IT AWAY”
–WX-78
“This will do nicely.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks potent.”
–Woodie
“Wilson can take it on a picnic.”
–Maxwell
“The göo hath been cöntained.”
–Wigfrid
“It's sticky like our webs!”
–Webber
“I would not spread that on any toast.”
–Warly
“Bad Sticky trapped!”
–Wormwood
“We can take it to go!”
–Winona
“Bottled abomination.”
–Wortox
“Cute!”
–Wurt
“We really should label that.”
–Walter
“What should we do with this?”
–Wanda
Icker Jar is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is not craftable and can only be obtained by collecting globs of Icker with an Empty Bottle.
The Icker Jar can be used to create an Icker Preserve. It can also be thrown out, leaving a glob on the ground for 1 day. Doing so will also break the Bottle. The glob can be collected by another Empty Bottle before it is gone.

'''Icker Jar''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is not craftable and can only be obtained by collecting globs of [[Icker]] with an [[Empty Bottle/DST|Empty Bottle]]. 

The Icker Jar can be used to create an [[Icker Preserve]]. It can also be thrown out, leaving a glob on the ground for 1 day. Doing so will also break the Bottle. The glob can be collected by another Empty Bottle before it is gone.

== {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Icker Jar
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Dreadstone
|count2 = 5
|tool = Shadowcraft Plinth
|result = Icker Preserve Kit
|note = return [[Empty Bottle/DST|Empty Bottles]]
}}
{{Recipe

|tool = Shadowcraft Plinth
|result = Ickies
|resultcount = 10
|character = Walter
|skill = Shadow Slinger
|note = return [[Empty Bottle/DST|Empty Bottles]]
}}
